channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree branches are hanging too low for people to walk under, 15th July
item.description:
The branches have been overhanging the pavement for quite a while and people now need to bend over to pass under them

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Monks Way, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of tree branches and other plant cuttings, 15th July
item.description:
Today we saw the homeowner had cut their tree and left all the cut branches in the pile on the grass opposite Redriff primary school. Please remove it all and fine the resident that has selfishly done this

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Salter Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: End panel smashed and glass on ground, 15th July
item.description:
End panel smashed and glass on ground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): James Watt Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - smashed glass or panels / jagged metal edges on shelter

item.title: End of Kingsley road, 15th July
item.description:
Same place as always. Why can’t you put up fly tipping fine notices or something to deter it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.description:
Lots of bags of rubbish and boxes and fridge freezer been dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Turnham Road, Brockley, Greater London

item.title: Commercial waste from London Rd shops, 15th July
item.description:
This commercial waste in black bags has been dumped for a week and was left uncollected by Lewisham Refuse collectors this morning.It originates from shops on London Rd and on Dartmouth Rd that are not using a paid for commercial collection service.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Havelock Walk, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of graffiti, 15th July
item.description:
Large are of graffiti on brick wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, London Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Finchley Rd northbound, junction w. Adelaide Rd., 15th July
item.description:
Seen 26.6.26: The northbound approach of Finchley Rd to the junction w. Adelaide Rd. displayed roadworks signs stating "road ahead closed". At the same time a diversion was signposted going- into the road ahead that was supposed to be closed! Such signage is contradictory and it caused confusion and additional traffic. The roadworks are complete now, but something needs to be learned from it. There needs to be more quality control of contractors. Signage should be un-ambiguous!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hilgrove Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Commercial waste from London Rd shops, 15th July
item.description:
This commercial waste in black bags has been dumped for a week and was left uncollected by Lewisham Refuse collectors this morning.It originates from shops on London Rd and on Dartmouth Rd that are not using a paid for commercial collection service.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Havelock Walk, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 55 Mansfield Road, London, NW3 2JE, 15th July
item.description:
Lime Tree in the front garden of 55 has a disease which has caused a whole to form in the trunk half way up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17-79, Mansfield Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish accumulating near bin store, 15th July
item.description:
Significant amount of rubbish, including hard rubbish, left outside bin store, and more rubbish seems to be accumulating. There seems to be an ongoing problem of fly tipping at this location. It would be helpful to know what the council is doing about it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yellow water leaking out of pavement outside 17 Chelsfield Road, 15th July
item.description:
As per photo, water leaking out of pavement. It looks coloured so not sure if it is sewage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Chelsfield Road, St Mary Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bathtub left outside our pub, 15th July
item.description:
Someone has left a bathtub in the bin area of our pub, The Three Compasses, E8 1NH. It is dangerous as it's propped up. Could fall. Our bin area is accessible from the street/pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a very decomposed fox (I'm assuming it's a fox as it has a bushy tail) on the river bank, 15th July
item.description:
There is a deceased fox on the river bank. It's very decomposed, you can see the ribs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Bridgen Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
